items: Overview agent wall of live `claude` terminals, grouped by repository.
Canvas split-panel workspace with file, git-diff, terminal, and Kanban viewers — tabs can pop out into their own native window.
Repo-grouped sidebar with a searchable file picker, scheduled sessions, and Canvas templates.
Keyboard-driven Create-panel launcher (⌘K) and per-type shortcuts.
In-app auto-update skeleton: a Settings → Updates pane that checks for and installs new releases (inert until signing keys are configured).
Busy/idle activity indicator with a three-state dot (working / finished / idle).
Inline rename of an agent by double-clicking its panel or card header.
Distribute Canvas panels evenly from the tab strip or by double-clicking a border.
